methodsAttempted.query: site:rudn.ru OR site:eng.rudn.ru RUDN University artificial intelligence policy generative AI academic integrity
methodsAttempted.notes: Firecrawl search surfaced mostly RUDN journal articles and one official RUDN journal editorial-policy page with an AI-use policy.

methodsAttempted.query: site:rudn.ru РУДН искусственный интеллект ChatGPT политика академическая честность генеративный ИИ
methodsAttempted.notes: Russian-language search surfaced official RUDN course-program PDFs with AI topics and academic honesty language, but not a broad university-wide AI-use policy.

methodsAttempted.query: site:rudn.ru РУДН нейросети обучение рекомендации преподавателям студентам искусственный интеллект
methodsAttempted.notes: Additional Russian search results were mainly journal articles, dissertations, and educational-program pages rather than binding university AI policy.
Fetched www.rudn.ru robots.txt and used allowed public /sveden/files PDF paths only; query URLs and blocked paths were not crawled.
Fetched journals.rudn.ru robots.txt; /about/editorialPolicies was not disallowed, while /files/ paths were disallowed and not used.

methodsAttempted.query: journals.rudn.ru Informatization in Education editorial policies artificial intelligence
methodsAttempted.notes: Verified the official RUDN Journal of Informatization in Education editorial-policy page and extracted the AI policy from the page itself.

artifacts.summary: Official-source discovery found no reliable public RUDN-wide AI policy. The staged claims are therefore limited to the RUDN Journal of Informatization in Education editorial AI-use policy and one RUDN course-program PDF that includes generative AI and responsible-use topics.

stopConditions: Stop after official RUDN journal and course-program sources support narrow claims.
Do not infer a RUDN-wide student, staff, or institutional AI policy from journal editorial policy or course-program text.
Do not use search snippets, research article abstracts, dissertations, event pages, or journal article metadata as policy evidence.
Do not stage raw HTML, PDFs, screenshots, or full normalized text in Git.

artifacts.claimText: The RUDN Journal of Informatization in Education editorial AI policy requires authors to disclose AI-tool use during manuscript preparation, including text generation, data work, translation or editing, literature-search or reference-list work, and creation or processing of media.

citation.citationTitle: Editorial Policies - RUDN Journal of Informatization in Education
citation.publisher: RUDN Journal of Informatization in Education

artifacts.claimText: The RUDN Journal of Informatization in Education editorial AI policy says reviewers should not enter manuscript content into publicly available or cloud-based AI services without explicit editor permission and compliance with confidentiality rules.

citation.citationTitle: Editorial Policies - RUDN Journal of Informatization in Education
citation.publisher: RUDN Journal of Informatization in Education

artifacts.claimText: The RUDN Journal of Informatization in Education editorial AI policy prohibits editors from using AI to make manuscript decisions; rejecting, accepting, or returning a manuscript for revision must rest with a human editor.

citation.publisher: RUDN Journal of Informatization in Education

artifacts.claimText: A RUDN Digital Literacy course program for the Ecology and Natural Resource Management bachelor's program includes generative AI tools, responsible AI use, authorship and originality, academic honesty, and practice with large language models as course topics.

artifacts.sourceTitle: Editorial Policies - RUDN Journal of Informatization in Education
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Authors are required to clearly and thoroughly disclose the use of AI tools at all stages of manuscript preparation, including: text generation; data preparation or verification; translation, paraphrasing, or editing of text; literature search or compilation of reference lists; creation or processing of images, graphs, charts, audio, and video materials.
artifacts.evidenceLocator: Policy of using artificial intelligence; section 1.4

artifacts.title: RUDN University AI Policy Source Review
artifacts.summary: This staged run found no reliable public RUDN-wide AI policy source. It records narrow, source-scoped claims from the official RUDN Journal of Informatization in Education AI editorial policy and from one official RUDN course-program PDF that includes generative AI and responsible-use topics. Research articles and duplicate course-program PDFs were not used as policy evidence.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
No broad RUDN University public AI policy was verified in this run; claims are limited to the cited journal editorial policy or course-program text.
The course-program PDF is evidence of curriculum content, not a binding AI-use rule.
artifacts.sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
